LAW AND MOTION 301, PLAINTIFF'S MOTION TO ENTER JUDGMENT UNDER TERMS OF STIPULATED SETTLEMENT. NO APPEARANCES. DUE TO AN ERROR IN ISSUING THE COURT'S TENTATIVE, THE COURT VACATES ITS TENTATIVE RULING AND TAKES THE MOTION OFF CALENDAR. THE CLERK IS DIRECTED TO INFORM PLAINTIFF OF THE MODIFIED RULING. PLAINTIFF IS DIRECTED TO RE-NOTICE THE MOTION. JUDGE: HAROLD E. KAHN, CLERK: E. LARNAUTI, NOT REPORTED

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Enter Judgment Under Terms

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Enter Judgment Under Terms Of Stipulated Settlement
Off Calendar Apr-13-2026 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: PLAINTIFF'S MOTION TO ENTER JUDGMENT UNDER TERMS OF STIPULATED SETTLEMENT

No appearances. Due to an error in issuing the court's tentative, the court vacates its tentative ruling and takes the motion off calendar. The clerk is directed to inform plaintiff of the modified ruling. Plaintiff is directed to re-notice the motion. Judge: Harold E. Kahn, Clerk: E. Larnauti, Not Reported (301/HEK)
